title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: containers-common bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for containers-common is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: This package contains common configuration files and documentation for container tools ecosystem, such as Podman, Buildah and Skopeo.  It is required because the most of configuration files and docs come from projects which are vendored into Podman, Buildah, Skopeo, etc. but they are not packaged separately.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update rhel-shortnames-overrides to include ubi9 - [RHEL-9.7] 0day (JIRA:RHEL-116618)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for containers-common is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

This package contains common configuration files and documentation for container tools ecosystem, such as Podman, Buildah and Skopeo.  It is required because the most of configuration files and docs come from projects which are vendored into Podman, Buildah, Skopeo, etc. but they are not packaged separately.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update rhel-shortnames-overrides to include ubi9 - [RHEL-9.7] 0day (JIRA:RHEL-116618)
